Risk_Description: Patient safety event due to missed crisis signal in asynchronous communication (messaging or assessment data not reviewed in time by provider)
Mitigation_Plan: Implement real-time NLP triage layer for patient messages; automated crisis resource delivery if provider does not respond within 4 hours; provider training on asynchronous safety monitoring; quarterly audit of flagged message response times
Related_Regulation: Joint Commission NPSG 15.01.01; State mandatory reporting laws

Risk_Description: Federal or state enforcement action related to mental health parity compliance in Headway's insurance network contracts
Mitigation_Plan: Quarterly parity compliance audit of all payer contracts; engage outside counsel for annual MHPAEA compliance review; monitor state AG enforcement trends; maintain documentation of network adequacy by state and plan
Related_Regulation: Mental Health Parity and Addiction Equity Act (MHPAEA); state parity laws

Risk_Description: Adverse outcome related to AI-generated clinical content (progress notes or response suggestions) containing inaccurate or clinically inappropriate information
Mitigation_Plan: Mandatory provider review and approval of all AI-generated content before finalization; clinical validation testing with board-certified reviewers; hallucination detection monitoring; clear UI indicating AI content is a draft requiring review
Related_Regulation: FDA guidance on Clinical Decision Support; state medical practice acts

Risk_Description: PHI data breach or unauthorized access to patient mental health records
Mitigation_Plan: SOC 2 Type II certification maintained; annual penetration testing; encryption at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3); role-based access controls; PHI access logging and anomaly detection; incident response plan tested quarterly
Related_Regulation: HIPAA Privacy and Security Rules; state health data privacy laws (e.g. CCPA SHIELD Act)

Risk_Description: State telehealth regulation changes that restrict or complicate cross-state practice for Headway providers
Mitigation_Plan: Monitor telehealth legislation in all 50 states via regulatory tracking service; participate in interstate compact advocacy (PSYPACT ASWB); maintain state-by-state compliance matrix; 90-day lead time process for regulatory changes
Related_Regulation: State telehealth practice acts; PSYPACT; Ryan Haight Act (for prescribing)

Risk_Description: Negative media coverage or social media backlash related to AI use in mental health care on the Headway platform
Mitigation_Plan: Transparent patient consent for all AI features; clear messaging that AI assists but does not replace clinical judgment; media response playbook prepared; provider advocacy program to amplify positive narratives; AI ethics advisory board

Risk_Description: Inadequate clinical oversight of prescribing practices by psychiatrists and psychiatric nurse practitioners on the platform
Mitigation_Plan: Monthly chart review of 5% of prescribing encounters; mandatory case consultation for controlled substances; prescribing dashboard with outlier detection; credentialing committee reviews flagged providers quarterly; benchmarking against APA guidelines
Related_Regulation: DEA regulations; state medical board prescribing guidelines; Ryan Haight Act

Risk_Description: Provider network inadequacy in specific states or specialties leading to long patient wait times and access complaints
Mitigation_Plan: Weekly monitoring of appointment availability by state and specialty; targeted recruitment in underserved areas; waitlist management with automated rebooking; specialty track expansion (perinatal PTSD substance use); payer contract network adequacy requirements tracked
Related_Regulation: State network adequacy regulations; CMS network adequacy standards for MA plans

Risk_Description: Insurance claim denial rates increase due to payer policy changes or coding errors reducing provider and company revenue
Mitigation_Plan: Automated claim scrubbing before submission; denial trend analysis dashboard; payer-specific coding guidelines maintained; appeals process with 30-day turnaround target; provider billing education program
Related_Regulation: CPT coding guidelines; payer-specific medical necessity criteria

Risk_Description: FTC or state AG investigation into marketing claims about treatment outcomes or patient experience on Headway platform
Mitigation_Plan: All marketing claims reviewed by legal and clinical teams; outcome statistics require peer-reviewed methodology; testimonials comply with FTC endorsement guidelines; no guarantees of clinical outcomes in marketing materials
Related_Regulation: FTC Act Section 5; state consumer protection laws; FTC Health Products Compliance Guidance

Risk_Description: Patient harm resulting from inappropriate treatment matching (patient paired with provider lacking relevant expertise for presenting condition)
Mitigation_Plan: Evidence-based matching algorithm v3 incorporates diagnosis severity and provider training; specialty tracks for high-acuity conditions; patient screening questionnaire flags complex presentations for clinical review; provider credentialing verifies specialty competencies
Related_Regulation: APA Ethical Principles; state scope of practice regulations

Risk_Description: Improper use or sharing of de-identified patient outcome data that could be re-identified or used in ways patients did not consent to
Mitigation_Plan: De-identification follows HIPAA Safe Harbor method with expert determination review; data use agreements for all research collaborations; IRB review for any outcome publication; patient consent forms explicitly describe data use; annual privacy impact assessment
Related_Regulation: HIPAA de-identification standards (Safe Harbor and Expert Determination); CCPA; state health data laws

Risk_Description: Platform outage or degradation during high-volume periods disrupting scheduled telehealth sessions
Mitigation_Plan: Multi-region cloud deployment with automatic failover; 99.95% uptime SLA target; load testing for 3x peak capacity; incident response with 15-minute escalation; provider notification system for planned maintenance; fallback to phone sessions protocol
Related_Regulation: HIPAA availability requirements; payer contract SLAs

Risk_Description: Non-compliance with informed consent requirements for AI-powered features across different state jurisdictions
Mitigation_Plan: State-by-state informed consent requirements matrix maintained; AI feature consent flows reviewed by legal in each jurisdiction; patient-facing explainability documentation for all AI features; opt-out mechanism for all AI-assisted features
Related_Regulation: State informed consent statutes; AMA AI ethics guidelines; proposed state AI transparency laws

Risk_Description: Measurement-based care assessment completion rates decline reducing ability to monitor patient outcomes and detect clinical deterioration
Mitigation_Plan: Assessment completion rate target of 80% monitored weekly; provider training on measurement-based care value; patient-facing UX optimization for assessment completion; automated reminders; gamification elements for provider dashboards; completion rates included in provider quality metrics
Related_Regulation: APA measurement-based care recommendations; CMS quality measure proposals for behavioral health
